register.title: Crea tu Cuenta
register.name: Nombre
register.termsShortTitle: Términos para Pasajeros de Lilo — Versión Corta
register.termsShortDesc:
Bienvenido a Lilo Rides
Al utilizar Lilo Rides, usted acepta cumplir con nuestras normas de seguridad, políticas de pago y estándares de la comunidad.

Puntos Importantes
• Lilo es una plataforma tecnológica que conecta a pasajeros con conductores independientes.
• La disponibilidad de los viajes no está garantizada en todo momento.
• Los pasajeros deben comportarse de manera respetuosa y segura durante los viajes.
• El uso del cinturón de seguridad es obligatorio.
• No se permiten actividades ilegales, violencia, drogas ni armas.
• Los viajes pueden ser monitoreados mediante GPS y sistemas de comunicación.
• Los pagos se procesan de forma electrónica a través de la aplicación.
• Pueden aplicarse cargos por cancelación.
• Lilo no se hace responsable por retrasos en el tráfico, objetos perdidos o eventos fuera de nuestro control.
• Algunos vehículos pueden utilizar cámaras de seguridad de tablero (dashcams) por motivos de seguridad.

Al continuar, usted confirma que ha leído y aceptado la totalidad de los Términos de Servicio y la Política de Privacidad.
register.mustAgree: Debes aceptar los Términos de Servicio y la Política de Privacidad para registrarte.
register.termsTitle: Lilo Rides Passenger Terms of Service
register.termsSec1Desc: Lilo is a technology platform that connects passengers with independent transportation providers. Lilo does not directly provide transportation services and is not a transportation carrier. Drivers using the platform are independent contractors and are not employees of Lilo.
register.termsSec2Desc: By using Lilo, you confirm that you are at least 18 years old or accompanied by an adult, you can legally enter into binding agreements, and all information provided is accurate.
register.termsSec3Desc: Passengers agree to treat drivers respectfully, wear seatbelts during rides, avoid illegal activity, violence, harassment, discrimination, or unsafe behavior, and avoid damaging vehicles. Lilo reserves the right to suspend or terminate accounts violating these rules.
register.termsSec4Desc: By using Lilo, you authorize electronic payment processing. Ride fares, cancellation fees, tolls, and applicable charges may apply. Refund requests are reviewed case-by-case.
register.termsSec5Desc: Lilo may collect and use GPS location data, ride history, device information, and phone communications (SMS and WhatsApp notifications) to improve safety, operations, and support.
register.termsSec6Desc: Some drivers may use dashboard cameras ("dashcams") for safety and security. By entering a vehicle affiliated with Lilo, passengers acknowledge and consent to possible video and audio recording where permitted by law.
register.termsSec7Desc: Lilo is not liable for traffic delays, weather conditions, actions of third parties, lost or stolen items, service interruptions, or indirect damages. Use of the platform is at your own risk.
register.termsSec8Desc: Passengers are responsible for their personal belongings. Lilo may assist in communication regarding lost items but is not responsible for lost or stolen property.
register.termsSec9Desc: Lilo reserves the right to suspend or terminate accounts for fraud, unsafe behavior, payment disputes, or violations of these Terms.
register.termsSec10Desc: These Terms shall be governed by the laws of the State of Georgia, United States.
